codeReview.summary: The Settings page adds the required scan-directory management, custom-platform dialogs, and About section on the intended route, and the final milestone state satisfies the settings-page assertions that depend on this surface. I did not find a high-confidence correctness bug that remains attributable to this feature after the follow-up polish work landed.

summary: Pass. The Settings view now exposes scan-directory management, custom-platform CRUD, and About metadata on a test-covered route, and the final repo state matches the feature's intended behavior.
